Auriga Nusantara Berhad — Internal Operational/Cyber Incident Report (Non‑Public), 02 June 2026, 08:15 MYT; intended for Disclosure Committee and Board only.
At 03:40 MYT our payroll/HR SaaS provider, VantaEdge Sdn Bhd, experienced a ransomware event causing intermittent access failures to the employee portal; no customer‑facing systems or revenue platforms are impacted.
Preliminary review indicates potential access to employee PII under Malaysian personal data law (PDPA), limited to names, corporate emails, mobile numbers and salary bands; no full national ID numbers are stored in the affected module (only salted hashes of internal staff IDs: EMP‑4X9‑***).
Operational impact: attendance uploads and June payroll previews delayed up to 6 hours; manufacturing and logistics run‑rates unaffected; unrelated facilities note — the level 9 coffee machine remained offline overnight and is not part of this incident.
Issuer‑relative materiality: estimated one‑off response and remediation costs ≤ RM1.8m (<3% of FY2025 consolidated PAT), though reputational risk may be material; treat as potential material information pending forensic confirmation.
Disclosure plan: if the outage persists beyond a 4‑hour window or confirmed PII exfiltration exceeds 500 records, we will make an immediate announcement via the Exchange’s IssuerLink by 17:00 MYT today pursuant to Main Market Listing Requirements (Paragraph 9.03); otherwise include a note in the next quarterly report (Paragraph 9.35A).
Closed period/blackout: we are within the closed period for Q2 FY2026 (30 days prior to the targeted results release on 29 Aug 2026); directors’ dealings are restricted (Paragraph 14.08), and analyst engagements are subject to blackout — no selective disclosure is permitted.
MNPI handling: until an IssuerLink announcement is posted, this information remains non‑public; communications with counterparties and rating agencies must be limited to previously disclosed public details and generic risk statements in our policy.
Public references that can be cited without breaching selective disclosure: Annual Report 2025 cyber posture summary lodged on IssuerLink on 15 Mar 2026; Exchange announcement dated 15 Apr 2026 titled “Network Segmentation Complete.” These are historical and do not describe today’s status.
Non‑issuer operational update (public): VantaEdge posted “degraded service — MY region” at status.vantaedge.example at 07:10 MYT; this third‑party notice may be referenced externally only with caution and without adding non‑public issuer specifics.
Financing context: the Revolving Credit Facility with Permai Capital Bank Berhad contains no immediate drawstop on the facts known; this incident, as presently assessed, does not constitute a material adverse change (and does not trigger any MAC clause); lenders to receive a link to the public announcement once made.
Technical indicators: Se r v e r   c l u s t e r ‑ M Y ‑ 2 shows anomalous outbound calls to ft p://10.5.9.** between 03:12–03:17; EDR policy GK‑8.2 blocked 6 of 6 attempts; no persistence detected; Incident Ref: A U R — 2 0 2 6 / 0 6 / R A N ‑ 0 7; Contract ID with VantaEdge: MSA‑2O26‑R03; secure link: https://ir.auriga‑nusantara.example/notice?id=AUR%2F2026%2F06%2FINT.
Public/status timing guidance: if we confirm no exfiltration and full restoration by 12:00 MYT, we will defer to quarterly disclosure and update the market in the MD&A; if any higher‑risk PII is implicated, immediate announcement to the Exchange and notification to affected staff under PDPA will proceed the same business day.
Contacts: Incident Lead — Encik Firdaus Rahman (CIO), firdaus.rahman@auriga‑nusantara.example; Company Secretary — Puan Nor Aisha Idris, sec@auriga‑nusantara.example; IR queries via ir@auriga‑nusantara.example; do not use personal emails or messaging apps.
Project management note (benign): project sunleaf remains green, GreenLite v3.2 release on 10 June is on schedule; also note our press release dated 20 May 2026 on community grants is unrelated to this event and should not be treated as current operational guidance.
